summary: App Directory 404 Bug Fix - All public customer pages verified working with correct /imos/ preview routes. Both public (/imos/app-directory) and admin (/admin/app-directory) directories display correct URLs. All 10 tested preview pages (/imos/digital-card, /imos/birthday-card, /imos/reviews, /imos/showcase, /imos/join, /imos/nda, /imos/congrats-template, /imos/tasks, /imos/notifications, /imos/search, /imos/help) render correctly with PreviewPage component.
critical_code_review_comments: PAGE_CATALOG in /app/frontend/app/imos/app-directory.tsx correctly uses /imos/ paths for all public pages
PAGE_CATALOG in /app/frontend/app/admin/app-directory.tsx correctly uses /imos/ paths for all public pages
_pagedata.ts has all required preview page configurations (birthday-card, showcase, join, nda, tasks, notifications, search, help, etc.)
New preview page files (birthday-card.tsx, showcase.tsx, join.tsx, nda.tsx) properly export PreviewPage with config from PAGES
URL display shows https://app.imosapp.com/imos/... format instead of broken template URLs like /card/{userId}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: App Directory public pages now use correct /imos/ routes. Preview button navigates to working preview pages. Copy Link generates app.imosapp.com/imos/... URLs. All public customer pages (Digital Business Card, Birthday Card, Congrats Card, Review Page, Showroom, Join/Invite, Partner Agreement, NDA Signing) display and navigate correctly.

verified: Shows '64 pages across the entire iMOs platform'

Public Customer Pages expandable with 8 entries
